name: trusty-analyzer-ui
description: Vanilla JS + D3 dashboard for the trusty-analyzer daemon. No build step required — files in dist/ are served directly and embedded into the Rust binary via include_dir!.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('trusty-analyzer-ui: vanilla dist, no build step required.')"
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Open via the analyzer daemon at http://127.0.0.1:7879/ui/')"
